name: kittyui-monorepo
description: A Rust core + React bindings framework for building rich terminal apps using the Kitty graphics protocol

scripts.lint: bun run lint:rs && bun run lint:ts
scripts.fmt: bun run fmt:rs && bun run fmt:ts
scripts.fmt:check: cargo fmt --manifest-path packages/core-rust/Cargo.toml --check && oxfmt --check packages/core packages/react packages/create-kittyui
